title: PingLess Attack Indicator
description: Pingless Attack Indicator (P.A.I) – No more attack cooldown bug and items bobbing up and down(especially easy to see in high ping)
body:
**Pingless Attack Indicator (P.A.I)** is a maintained & enhanced version of the mod [Attack Cooldown Sync](https://modrinth.com/mod/attack-cooldown-sync) created by **catgirljade**.

This project exists to keep the mod working on newer versions and to give you an attack cooldown indicator that doesn't lag and stop items from also bobbing up and down

## What it does

When you swap items in your hotbar, the game takes a moment to update your attack speed. This causes that annoying delay on your cooldown indicator that makes your game not feel and look clean especially in high ping

**P.A.I fixes this:** it calculates the correct attack speed on your computer instantly when you swap items. Your attack indicator stays perfectly synced – no more waiting for the server.

## How to use

Just install and play. No config needed

## Features

- Compensates for ping when swapping items
- Takes into account both hands, Haste and Conduit Power effects

## Why this mod exists

The original mod was simple and did it's job but it wasn't being updated anymore. so i got the mod's code and made it work for newer and other unsupported Minecraft versions, keeping the same idea: removing the delay from your attack cooldown indicator and the item bobbing up and down

Original mod by catgirljade: https://modrinth.com/mod/attack-cooldown-sync

Jesus loves you!! If you repent of your sins He can save you :)
